traits.name: Fast Tracking
traits.description: Designed for anti-fighter work. No Control step-down when targeting small or fast-moving craft at Close range.

traits.name: Turbolaser Cycling
traits.description: High-energy cycling between shots. Cannot fire on consecutive rounds unless the Engineer uses Reroute Power to feed additional energy to the mount.

gambits.name: Linked Fire
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. Fire a second mount in the same arc as part of the same attack action. The second mount resolves at the reduced tier. Both mounts spend ammunition/power.

traits.name: Capital Grade
traits.description: Designed for ship-to-ship engagements against large targets. When targeting a ship of equal or larger Scale, ignore 1 step of the Scale Power die penalty (the weapon is built for punching above its weight class).

gambits.name: Linked Fire
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. Fire a second mount in the same arc as part of the same attack action. The second mount resolves at the reduced tier. Both mounts spend ammunition/power.

gambits.name: Overcharge
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. Step up the Power die for this attack. After the attack resolves, the mount gains [Disabled] — it cannot fire until the Engineer spends an action to reset it.

traits.name: Ion Discharge
traits.description: Deals no hull damage. Instead, the Effect Tier determines the severity of system disruption. Fleeting: target system gains [Disoriented] equivalent (one action degraded). Masterful: target system is Impaired. Legendary: target system is Debilitated or Offline (attacker's choice).

gambits.name: Ion Pulse
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. Instead of targeting a single system, the ion discharge cascades — affect a second system on the target ship at one tier lower than the resolved result.

traits.name: Ordnance
traits.description: Limited ammunition — typically 4–8 torpedoes per launcher. Each attack consumes one torpedo. When the magazine is empty, the mount is inert until rearmed at a facility.

traits.name: Lock Required
traits.description: Requires a target lock from the Operator (Paint Target or Scan at Masterful+) before firing. Without a lock, the attack suffers a Control step-down.

gambits.name: Concussive Blast
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. The torpedo detonates in a zone-wide blast. All ships in the target's zone are affected at the reduced tier. Allies in the zone are not exempt.

gambits.name: Overcharge
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. Step up the Power die for this attack. The launcher gains [Disabled] after firing — the overcharged launch destabilizes the feed mechanism.

traits.name: Ordnance
traits.description: Limited ammunition — typically 6–12 missiles per launcher. Each attack consumes one missile.

traits.name: Dumbfire Capable
traits.description: Unlike torpedoes, concussion missiles can be fired without a target lock. Without a lock, no Control penalty — the missile tracks on its own short-range guidance.

gambits.name: Concussive Blast
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. The missile detonates in a zone-wide blast. All ships in the target's zone are affected at the reduced tier.

traits.name: Rapid Fire
traits.description: Four barrels cycling in sequence. When the Gunner's Control die result is 8+, the volume of fire grants an automatic +1 Effect Tier (in addition to the standard 8+ bonus).

gambits.name: Linked Fire
gambits.rule: Reduce your Effect by 1 Tier. Fire a second mount in the same arc as part of the same attack action. The second mount resolves at the reduced tier.

traits.name: Ground Attack
traits.description: Optimized for strafing runs against ground targets. When targeting ground installations or vehicles from above, step up the Power die.
